sections.paragraph:
Μελχί, ὁ indecl. (מַלְכִּי) Melchi, in the genealogy of Jesus (AssMos Fgm. c)

① son of Jannai, father of Levi Lk 3:24.

② son of Addi, father of Neri vs. 28.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

AssMos AssMos = Assumption of Moses—List 2

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 628
